sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-worker skill says agent-browser MUST be invoked, but the worker used direct `agent-browser` CLI commands instead of invoking an agent-browser skill. Clarify whether CLI usage satisfies this requirement.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 2eb86d80-2056-4919-836c-55bf5fda8ee7 shows Execute commands `agent-browser --session ...` and no `Tool: Skill {"skill": "agent-browser"}` entry.

summary: Reviewed feature app-state-and-styles at commit ccfb05d: requirements coverage is complete and code quality is solid for this scope; review result is pass. Added one non-blocking shared-state observation about ui-worker skill wording vs observed procedure.
